channel.title: Tech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Anthropic-funded group backs candidate attacked by rival AI super PAC
item.description: Dueling pro-AI PACs have centered around backing or targeting one New York congressional bid: Alex Bores, whose RAISE Act requires AI developers to di...

item.title: Lucid Motors slashes 12% of its workforce as it seeks profitability
item.description: The layoffs affect hundreds of full-time workers in the US, according to an internal memo obtained by TechCrunch.

item.title: Peak XV raises $1.3B, doubles down on AI as global VC rivalry in India heats up
item.description: Peak XV says most of its new capital will target India as the firm prioritizes AI, fintech and cross-border bets while navigating recent partner depar...

item.title: Remember HQ? ‘Quiz Daddy’ Scott Rogowsky is back with TextSavvy, a daily mobile game show
item.description: The former HQ host Scott Rogowsky is back with TextSavvy, a live mobile game show that he's building on his own terms.

item.title: Prepare for pitch battle: Startup Battlefield 200 nominations are open
item.description: Nominations for TechCrunch Startup Battlefield 200 are open. Pitch at Disrupt 2026 in October in front of top VCs and the full TechCrunch audience. No...

item.title: InScope nabs $14.5M to solve the pain of financial reporting
item.description: The startup, founded by accountants who worked at Flexport, Miro, Hopin and Thrive Global, automates the difficulties of prepping financial statements...

item.title: AI’s promise to indie filmmakers: faster, cheaper, lonelier
item.description: AI expands access to filmmaking for resource-constrained creators. But as efficiency becomes the industry’s north star, creativity risks being overwhe...

item.title: Great news for xAI: Grok is now pretty good at answering questions about Baldur’s Gate
item.description: A new report from Business Insider reveals that high-level engineers at xAI were pulled off other projects to make sure Grok could answer detailed que...

item.title: Apple’s iOS 26.4 arrives in public beta with AI music playlists, video podcasts, and more
item.description: Several updates are introduced in iOS 26.4, including an AI-powered playlist-generation feature in Apple Music, support for video content in the Podca...

item.title: Meta’s metaverse leaves virtual reality
item.description: Meta said it's shifting focus for Horizons Worlds to be "almost exclusively mobile" and that it will separate its Quest VR platform from the virtual w...
